notes: 47-gen CMA-ES over 9 free parameters with corrected FlashAttention basis (prefix cache fix). Best 57.48% at gen 46. Did not beat iter32 (56.49%, delta=0.99pp). Sigma=0.14 at stop -- not fully converged. The basis fix changes the landscape vs iter32; CMA-ES needs more gens or a different approach to beat iter32 with the corrected model.
